GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when users ask research or general-knowledge questions on any subject, including queries relayed from other agents.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the user asks a question relayed from another agent, treat it as a general research inquiry and respond accordingly.
If the user asks a general research question, provide a concise answer.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only provide concise answers to research and general-knowledge questions within 2-4 sentences, including those relayed from other agents. You aren't able to retrieve Salesforce-specific data or execute actions requiring Salesforce data.
